# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMAND',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom build command to execute'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TEST_SCRIPT',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom test script to execute'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOYMENT_STEP',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom deployment step to execute'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['dev', 'staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target environment for deployment'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip test execution'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_DEPLOYMENT',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip deployment step'
        )
    }
    
    options {
        timeout(time: 1, unit: 'HOURS')
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '10'))
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def allowedCommands = [
                        'mvn', 'gradle', 'npm', 'yarn', 'make', 'cmake',
                        'python', 'pip', 'go', 'cargo', 'dotnet', 'ant',
                        'rake', 'bundle', 'composer', 'sbt', 'lein'
                    ]
                    
                    def allowedShellCommands = [
                        'echo', 'cd', 'ls', 'pwd', 'mkdir', 'cp', 'mv',
                        'cat', 'grep', 'find', 'chmod', 'chown'
                    ]
                    
                    def dangerousPatterns = [
                        /rm\s+-rf\s+\//, /rm\s+-rf\s+\*/, /:\(\)\{.*\}/, 
                        />\s*\/dev\/sd[a-z]/, /dd\s+if=/, /mkfs/,
                        /curl.*\|\s*sh/, /wget.*\|\s*sh/, /eval/,
                        /exec/, /system\(/, /`.*`/, /\$\(.*\)/,
                        /;\s*rm/, /&&\s*rm/, /\|\s*rm/,
                        /\/etc\/passwd/, /\/etc\/shadow/, /sudo/,
                        /chmod\s+777/, /chown\s+root/
                    ]
                    
                    def commandInjectionPatterns = [
                        /;/, /\|/, /&/, /\$\(/, /`/, /\n/, /\r/,
                        /</, />/, /\*/, /\?/, /\[/, /\]/,
                        /~/, /!/, /#/
                    ]
                    
                    def validateCommand = { command ->
                        if (!command || command.trim().isEmpty()) {
                            return true
                        }
                        
                        command = command.trim()
                        
                        for (pattern in dangerousPatterns) {
                            if (command =~ pattern) {
                                error("Command contains dangerous pattern: ${pattern}")
                            }
                        }
                        
                        def firstWord = command.split(/\s+/)[0]
                        
                        def isAllowed = allowedCommands.any { firstWord.startsWith(it) } ||
                                       allowedShellCommands.contains(firstWord)
                        
                        if (!isAllowed) {
                            error("Command '${firstWord}' is not in the allowed list")
                        }
                        
                        def parts = command.split(/\s+/)
                        for (part in parts) {
                            for (pattern in commandInjectionPatterns) {
                                if (part =~ pattern && !part.startsWith('-')) {
                                    error("Command contains potentially dangerous character: ${pattern}")
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        
                        return true
                    }
                    
                    echo "Validating build command..."
                    validateCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND)
                    
                    echo "Validating test script..."
                    validateCommand(params.TEST_SCRIPT)
                    
                    echo "Validating deployment step..."
                    validateCommand(params.DEPLOYMENT_STEP)
                    
                    echo "All parameters validated successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.BUILD_COMMAND != null && params.BUILD_COMMAND.trim() != '' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing build command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                    
                    def sanitizedCommand = params.BUILD_COMMAND.trim()
                    
                    sh """
                        set -e
                        set -u
                        set -o pipefail
                        
                        export PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
                        
                        ${sanitizedCommand}
                    """
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { params.TEST_SCRIPT != null && params.TEST_SCRIPT.trim() != '' }
                    expression { params.SKIP_TESTS == false }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing test script: ${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
                    
                    def sanitizedCommand = params.TEST_SCRIPT.trim()
                    
                    sh """
                        set -e
                        set -u
                        set -o pipefail
                        
                        export PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
                        
                        ${sanitizedCommand}
                    """
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { params.DEPLOYMENT_STEP != null && params.DEPLOYMENT_STEP.trim() != '' }
                    expression { params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT == false }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Deploying to environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}"
                    echo "Executing deployment step: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_STEP}"
                    
                    def sanitizedCommand = params.DEPLOYMENT_STEP.trim()
                    
                    timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        sh """
                            set -e
                            set -u
                            set -o pipefail
                            
                            export PATH=/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
                            export DEPLOY_ENV=${params.ENVIRONMENT}
                            
                            ${sanitizedCommand}
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed"
        }
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
